title: Kidou Butouden G Gundam: 30-shuunen Kinen Fighting Movie

alternative_titles.en: Mobile Fighter G Gundam: 30th Anniversary Fighting Movie
alternative_titles.ja: 『機動武闘伝Gガンダム』30周年記念ファイティングムービー

synopsis:
A "fighting movie" short, created to celebrate the 30th anniversary of the Mobile Fighter G Gundam anime. The short was created with experimental digital animation techniques, including 3D CG during the previsualization stage to plan out motion sequences. 

(Source: ANN, edited)
